name: Chicken Pepperoni
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the pepperoni into 1/4-inch cubes. Cook in a frying pan over medium heat until mostly grease is removed. Remove from the pan and set aside.
2. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
3. Season the flour and toss the chicken pieces until coated.
4. Brown in the pepperoni fat (and olive oil, if needed). Set aside.
5. Stir the tomato sauce and remaining flour together in a frying pan.
6. Add the chicken and pepperoni back to the pan. Pour in 1/3-1/2 cup water to cover the meat. Allow to simmer for 30-45 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
7. Serve over a bed of pasta.
